text: Aerobic exercise, lumbar stabilization, stretching, water exercise, nerve and tendon-slip exercise, resistance training, and strength training all provide health and well-being benefits for pregnant women.
Moderate intensity physical activity is recommended throughout the entire duration of pregnancy across all exercise modalities.
Water-based exercise is a beneficial and recommended exercise modality during pregnancy.
Resistance training and strength training are safe and beneficial forms of exercise during pregnancy when performed at moderate intensity.
Physical activity during pregnancy helps prevent maternal and infant health issues.
